holdings.infoBox: GRNI is an equity ETF with a total of 176 individual holdings. The top holdings are KLA Corporation stock at 3.08%, Robinhood Markets at 2.82%, Eli Lilly and Company at 2.65%, Arista Networks at 2.58%, and GE Aerospace at 2.58%.

overview.description: The fundstrat Granny Shots US Large Cap & Income ETF (GRNI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in 20-50 US large-cap securities across 5 to 10 themes. The fund also employs an options strategy for additional income. GRNI was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Fundstrat.
